meta.name: Job system test
meta.description: Test the functionality of the job system

log.msg: [INFO] Testing if a task can run in the job system

log.expected: The value was set to 1 by the task
log.actual: The value was set to 1 by the task

log.msg: [INFO] Testing if automatic task ordering works

log.expected: Expected the recorded value to be 5 and the current value to be 2
log.actual: Expected the recorded value to be 5 and the current value to be 2

log.msg: [INFO] Testing if cross-thread resource sharing and bulk tasks work

log.expected: Expected the count the be equal to the expected count
log.actual: The count is equal to the expected count
